title: Can AI pass this test? School districts start projects backed by Microsoft and Gates Foundation
summary: Washington school districts gathered at Microsoft to launch AI projects in education, backed by grants from Microsoft and the Gates Foundation. National research presented at the event showed that even the most ambitious districts are struggling to measure whether AI is making a difference. Read More
author: Todd Bishop

title: Former GitHub CEO launches new developer platform with huge $60M seed round
summary: Entre, valued at $300 million, has a big vision to rebuild the developer platform around AI coding agents. Read More
author: Taylor Soper

title: Elon Musk’s xAI lands in Bellevue, joining OpenAI in growing Eastside AI corridor
summary: Elon Musk's xAI is setting up shop in downtown Bellevue, with job listings showing the office will go beyond infrastructure to serve as a hub for core AI model development. Read More
author: Todd Bishop

title: Zillow at 20: Real estate giant leans on AI to make homebuying hurt less
summary: Zillow built its brand by letting people window‑shop for homes and by generating advertising revenue from real estate agents. But now, as Zillow marks its 20th anniversary on Monday, its leaders are pushing toward something bigger. Read More
author: Taylor Soper

title: Beyond one-on-one: Authoring, simulating, and testing dynamic human-AI group conversations
AI helps archaeologists solve a Roman gaming mystery
summary: Researchers used AI-driven virtual players to test more than 100 rule sets, matching gameplay to wear patterns on a Roman limestone board.
author: Tom Metcalfe

title: AI reads brain MRIs in seconds and flags emergencies
summary: Researchers at the University of Michigan have created an AI system that can interpret brain MRI scans in just seconds, accurately identifying a wide range of neurological conditions and determining which cases need urgent care. Trained on hundreds of thousands of real-world scans along with patient histories, the model achieved accuracy as high as 97.5% and outperformed other advanced AI tools.

title: How to Improve Student Retention: AI-Powered Early Intervention That Works in 2026
summary:
According to the National Center for Education Statistics, only 64% of students who begin a bachelor’s degree complete it within six years. For a mid-sized university with 10,000 students, that’s 3,600 students who never graduate. Universities track these numbers closely. Most have sophisticated analytics identifying at-risk students: declining GPAs, attendance patterns, financial aid status. The […]
